text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian and Biwa Hayahide are<n>staring out
across the track, having<n>finished preparations for
their special<n>race.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The track's set, and we have a rough<n>estimate
of the turnout. All that's left<n>is...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Figuring out who's gonna race.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes. As it's the Fan Fest, this can't<n>be any
ordinary race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
So we gotta give the fans the<n>matchup they want
most.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...What about a one-on-one between<n>Teio and
McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
A showdown between a<n>once-in-a-generation
genius and a<n>prodigy of distinguished lineage is<n>
bound to draw a crowd. Another<n>possible
matchup would be...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
A fight to reign supreme between the<n>Emperor
Symboli Rudolf and another<n>individual.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I think Maruzensky could take her on.<n>Or we
could have a Triple Crown<n>event. A dream race
with Mr. C.B....

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, the list goes on. Do you have<n>any ideas
as to who the most<n>crowd-pleasing racers might
be?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Only one combo comes to mind.<n>They're the best
of the best.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh? Who in the world could you be<n>referring to?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That fancy brain of yours on sleep<n>mode or
something?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Who do you think's standing right<n>here? Just a
couple of regular old<n>runners?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Do you mean to say...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The theory wiz awakens. That's right,<n>a clash
between the world's mightiest<n>sisters!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But! You wish to have our showdown<n>here?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I know it's a little sooner than we<n>thought, but
it'd be pretty cool to see<n>who's strongest right
now, right?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Now that you mention it, peoplehave been asking about it. Thisshould have been my first thought.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Or perhaps... I may have been<n>deliberately putting
it out of mind.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: So how 'bout it, Big Sis?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Do you even need to ask? I've been<n>waiting for
this a long time.
The day of the long-awaited race<n>finally arrives...
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There are more people here than I<n>expected... It
seems I miscalculated.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Goes to show how many people<n>were waiting to
see this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...You good?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I've not a flicker of doubt standing<n>beside you. I
feel absolutely amazing.<n>What about you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I'd be lying if I said I felt the same<n>as always.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
But it's a change for the better. I've<n>ripped down
countless barriers... I've<n>suffered through a lot...
but I'm<n>standing here now. That's all there is<n>
to it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm glad you're feeling well.<n>It'd be a pity if
you weren't.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Meaning?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's simple. I formulated my winning<n>equation
under the assumption that<n>you'd be in top
running condition!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, did you now? Well I'm gonna<n>tear that
equation to shreds!
Ka-chak!
Wooooo!

The race proves to be a truly<n>spectacular contest
that remains a<n>vivid memory for all who witness
it.
